language.title: Language
language.sub: Choose the language for this app on this device.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.sub: Get alerts on this phone — even when the app is closed.
notifications.statusOn: On — this phone will get push alerts.
notifications.statusOff: Not on yet for this phone.
notifications.toastBlocked: Notifications are blocked. Turn them on in your phone settings, then try again.
notifications.toastUnconfigured: Push isn’t set up on the server yet.
notifications.toastUnsupported: This device can’t receive push notifications.
notifications.toastGenericOn: Could not turn on push — please try again.
notifications.toastTurnedOff: Push turned off on this device
notifications.toastGenericOff: Could not fully turn off push — please try again.
notifications.hintRollout: Push is still rolling out and isn’t on for your account yet.
notifications.iosGuide: To get push on your iPhone, add this app to your Home Screen first: tap Share → Add to Home Screen, then open it from the Home Screen and turn push on here.
notifications.cantReceive: This device can’t receive push notifications.
notifications.serverNotSet: Push isn’t set up on the server yet — check back soon.
notifications.blockedHint: Notifications are blocked for this app. Turn them back on in your phone settings, then reopen the app.
notifications.prefsSub: Pick how you want to hear about each one.
notifications.prefsEmpty: No notifications are turned on for your role yet.
